did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Correspondence, news clippings, and a scrapbook.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Included are a letterbook, a scrapbook, and a few loose papers.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Included are a letterbook, a scrapbook, and a few loose papers. Most of the letters are to business associates and are primarily concerned with Shaw's unsuccessful efforts to raise funds in England to build an electric railroad in Canada and with the founding of the Canadian Niagara Power Company, of which Shaw was president. The scrapbook consists of newspaper clippings and assorted memorabilia concerning Shaw's service as U.S. consul in Toronto.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Albert D. Shaw. Papers, #1909. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
